---
title: "Advertising Age"
page-layout: article
---

# Advertising Age

## Description

News and analysis platform covering advertising, marketing, media, agencies, and brand strategy. Supports research on marketing trends, campaign strategy, and advertising industry developments.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-ad-age?_ga=2.49974048.788554764.1679317615-416833816.1675090855)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
